a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan:
Disability-Adjusted Life Years
(DALYs) per 100,000 individuals from all causes. DALYs measure the total
burden of disease – both from years of life lost due to premature death and years lived with a disability. One
DALY equals one lost year of healthy life.
Data source: IHME, Global Burden of Disease (2024)
